use_cases: Hero section text with interactive cursor-following reveal effects
Portfolio or creative landing pages needing animated typography
Interactive text overlays with ripple animations
ai_summary: A minimalist text reveal component with cursor-tracking ripple animation and theme-aware gradient fills. The effect creates an SVG-based text mask that reveals based on cursor position, with smooth color gradients adapting between light and dark modes. Built with framer-motion for fluid animations and supports dynamic theme switching.
